name: shivdeepak-marketplace
description: A curated registry of Agent Skills by Shiv Deepak — for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and beyond.

plugins.name: speakeasy
plugins.description: Coaches spoken English after each reply on voice input. Flags grammar, word choice, and idiom errors; stays silent when clean.

plugins.name: self-documenting
plugins.description: Keeps a project self-documenting by updating docs alongside code — triggered by any change that adds, removes, or alters behavior.

plugins.name: knowledge-base-builder
plugins.description: Turns a folder of notes, docs, or plans into an LLM-navigable knowledge base using index.md files and per-note summaries. No vector DB.

plugins.name: skillship
plugins.description: Drives the skillship CLI to scaffold, validate, package, and publish Agent Skills across platforms.
